quiz_meta.title: Skrining Psikologis - Calon Bidan
quiz_meta.description: Tes screening awal untuk evaluasi kepribadian, stress resilience, dan emotional intelligence calon bidan dengan fokus pada maternal care

Emotional_Stability.importance: HIGH - Pregnant women are emotionally sensitive

unique_challenges_for_midwife.emotional_intensity: Ibu hamil & keluarga sangat emotional - perlu ekstra empati
unique_challenges_for_midwife.safety_critical: Setiap keputusan mempengaruhi nyawa ibu dan bayi
unique_challenges_for_midwife.physical_demands: Shift kerja panjang, standing, physically demanding
unique_challenges_for_midwife.communication_skills: Must balance being supportive dan informative

agreeableness_critical.note: Maternal care memerlukan empati exceptionally tinggi

conscientiousness_low.note: Safety prosedur obstetri tidak boleh diabaikan

neuroticism_high.note: Pregnant women peka terhadap emosi provider
